  Title: Use conventional commit format — <type>(<scope>): <description>
  Types: feat | fix | refactor | test | docs | chore | ci
  Keep the title under 70 characters.
  Example: fix(e2e): align timeout settings with Cloud Function limits
-->

  - <what changed and why — focus on the motivation, not the mechanics>
  - <bullet 2>
  - <bullet 3>

  - [ ] <concrete, checkable verification step>
